message: My cost is around 50. I'm looking for a fair trade that works for both of us.
I'm focused on steady volume. Keep asks around 30-35 and I'll bid to match, ensuring trades every round for consistent payoffs.
I can't go that low given my higher costs. I'll lower my ask to 55 this round - meet me closer and we can both profit.
My max budget is 45. I can't trade above that without losses. If you ask 45 or less, I'll match. Let's target 40 for steady trades.
